title: Daily Autonomous Workflow — Phase 30

steps.name: Data Refresh
actions: pull GSC fresh data via scripts/gsc-daily-pipeline.py
check Phase 30 daily lock (prevent duplicate runs)

modes.CONTENT_CLICK_MODE: Active when real pages have impressions but 0 clicks — fix snippets, CTAs, above-fold answers
modes.INDEXING_MODE: Active when high-value pages not indexed — improve internal links, reduce crawl noise
modes.MONEY_PAGE_MODE: Active when money pages need trust/UX upgrades
modes.DATA_ASSET_MODE: Active when data asset is due (weekly cycle)
modes.FREE_PR_MODE: Active when email-only opportunities exist with score >=90
modes.HOLD_MODE: Active when data stale, GSC token dead, or risk detected

steps.name: Execute 3-5 High-Impact Actions
allowed_daily_actions: add 10-25 contextual internal links to money pages
create or update 1 original data asset (weekly)

steps.name: Deploy If Changes Made
actions: git add -A && git commit -m 'Phase 30: Daily run — $(date +%Y-%m-%d)' && git push

steps.name: Report Only Measurable Outputs
rules: DO NOT report success for activity alone
DO NOT claim improvement without data

never_do: restart old risky automations (HARO, Pinterest, X/Twitter)
count old fixes as today's work
spend money on any tool or service
